title: Migrate timeline to SQLite + clunger API

log.context: Migrate timeline to SQLite + clunger API

All 44 events migrated and served. Here is what was done:

**Changes across 3 repos:**

### 1. `/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts` (clunger repo)
- Added SQLite timeline database initialization at `/mnt/data/clunger/timeline.db` with WAL mode
- Schema: `timeline_events` table with id, date, title, description, category, icon, url, source, created_at
- Four REST endpoints:
  - `GET /api/timeline` -- public, returns all events sorted by date
  - `POST /api/timeline` -- auth required (tauth_github or ...(truncated)
